title: Crepinella umbraculifera
taxonomy: Crepinella umbraculifera is classified within the family Hymenophyllaceae, which is a group of ferns commonly known as the filmy ferns. This family is a part of the larger division Pteridophyta, which includes all ferns. The order to which Crepinella umbraculifera belongs is Hymenophytales, and its class is Polypodiopsida, which comprises all vascular ferns. The division of Pteridophyta is itself a part of the kingdom Plantae, indicating that Crepinella umbraculifera is a plant species. Overall, the classification of Crepinella umbraculifera reflects its evolutionary relationships with other organisms in the plant kingdom.

The health benefits of Crepinella umbraculifera include its potential to enhance immune function, reduce inflammation, and exhibit antioxidant properties, making it a valuable resource for natural health remedies.
